scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:push --prefix server
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix server && npx prisma generate --prefix server && npx prisma db push --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && node server/src/seed.js && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
